person.name: Riya Sharma
person.title: Full-Stack Developer
person.tagline: I build and ship reliable web apps end to end — from database to UI.

sections.headline: I ship web apps, end to end
sections.description: Full-stack developer with 2.5 years building production web apps. I care about clean APIs, fast UIs and code that's easy for the next person to read.

sections.heading: About me
paragraphs: I'm a full-stack developer who enjoys owning a feature from idea to production — designing the data model, building the API, and crafting the UI.
I work mostly in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem, write tests for the things that matter, and like keeping deployments boring and reliable.
credentials: 2.5 years building production React + Node apps
Owned features used by 50k+ monthly users
Comfortable across DB, API and frontend

sections.heading: Selected Work
sections.subheading: A few things I've built and shipped.

items.title: Billing Dashboard
items.desc: Rebuilt a React + Node billing dashboard; cut page load from 4s to 0.9s and reduced support tickets 30%.

items.title: Public API & SDK
items.desc: Designed a versioned REST API with docs and a JS SDK; onboarded 40+ integration partners.

items.title: Analytics Pipeline
items.desc: Event pipeline (Node, PostgreSQL, Redis) powering real-time product dashboards.

sections.heading: Where I've worked
body: Software Engineer, ProductCo (2024–present) — full-stack feature work on a B2B SaaS used by 50k+ users.
Junior Developer, StartupX (2022–2024) — shipped the customer portal and internal admin tools from scratch.
points: Led the migration to TypeScript across the frontend
Set up CI/CD that cut release time in half
On-call rotation: improved error tracking & alerts

sections.heading: Let's build something
sections.subheading: Open to full-time and freelance full-stack work.

sections.heading: Need a full-stack developer who ships?
sections.subheading: Let's talk — I reply within a day.
